multi_step: Task likely requires identifying the six bricks, reasoning about how they can combine into a 3D solid, and comparing that construction against 5 answer options.
This is not direct text lookup; it involves visual-spatial composition and option elimination.
choices has 5 options (A-E), which supports comparative reasoning rather than a single-step extraction.

registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true, so the sample is structurally complete.
A later verifier could check whether option D is the only constructible solid from the shown bricks, though verification still depends on visual-spatial analysis.
